included.business_name: ONE9 Travel Center (former Pilot Travel Center #254)
included.description: ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company's One9 Fuel Network, formerly Pilot Travel Center #254) at I-24 Exit 169 (GA-299/US-11) in Wildwood, the only full-service truck stop on I-24's short Georgia segment in Dade County. Open 24 hours with 6 diesel lanes, bulk DEF, 3 showers, CAT scale, Subway, ATM, and about 20 truck parking spaces.

included.business_name: CAT Scale at ONE9 Travel Center Wildwood
included.description: Certified CAT scale located at the ONE9 Travel Center (former Pilot #254) at I-24 Exit 169 (GA-299/US-11) in Wildwood, GA. Available 24 hours alongside the travel center's diesel lanes.

held.business_name: Georgia I-24 Weigh / Inspection Station (Dade County)
held.hold_reason: No official Georgia source (dot.ga.gov / dps.georgia.gov) found confirming an I-24 weigh or inspection station in Dade County with a civic address. GA DPS weigh-station and CVE region pages and general weigh-station directories (allstays, coopsareopen, truckstopsandservices) did not surface an I-24 Georgia facility in search results. Held pending official confirmation.

Listed in older truck-stop directories at I-24 Exit 169 with 24-hour diesel, certified scales, and truck parking, but sources conflict on the address (405 Highway 299 vs 955 Highway 299 — possibly two separate Mapco stations) and current trucker amenities (scales, tire/mechanical road service, RV parking) come only from stale directory data. Yelp shows a Mapco Express operating at 405 Highway 299 as a gas station. Held pending verification of address and current truck services.

excluded.business_name: Tennessee Welcome Center (I-24 eastbound near Chattanooga)
excluded.reason: Welcome center between GA Exit 169 and Chattanooga is located in Tennessee, not Georgia; belongs to the completed I-24 Tennessee batch. Georgia DOT's rest area / welcome center list shows no I-24 facility in Georgia.
Located at 2481 Slygo Rd, Trenton, GA, which serves an I-59 exit south of the I-24/I-59 junction — not at I-24 GA exits 167 or 169.

excluded.business_name: Pilot Travel Center (Rising Fawn, GA area)
excluded.reason: Serves I-59 Exit 4 (Puddin Ridge Rd) near Rising Fawn in southern Dade County — on I-59, roughly 16 miles from the I-24 Georgia segment; not at I-24 exits 167/169.
